summary_en: Weathernews raised FY2026 fiscal-year dividend forecast by ¥5 per share to ¥62.50 (¥40 commemorative) to celebrate 40th founding anniversary, targeting 100% payout ratio.
title_en: Notice Regarding Revision of Dividend Forecast (40th Anniversary Commemorative Dividend Increase)
translation_en_brief: Weathernews Inc. announced on May 18, 2026 a revision to its dividend forecast for fiscal year ending May 2026. The company increased its year-end dividend per share by ¥5, from the previously announced ¥57.50 to ¥62.50. This comprises ¥22.50 as ordinary dividend and ¥40 as commemorative dividend. The increase was decided by the Board of Directors based on upward revision of consolidated financial projections (operating profit, ordinary profit, and net income attributable to parent company shareholders). The company stated it is implementing this increase to mark its 40th founding anniversary and express gratitude to shareholders for their long-term support, with a dividend policy targeting a consolidated payout ratio of approximately 100%. The disclosure notes that the company executed two-for-one stock splits on December 1, 2024 and March 1, 2026, affecting the per-share dividend comparisons.
